title: Lesson 42 — Wild and Cultivated

words.example: Verdant hills rolled away from the farmhouse.
The greenhouse was thick with lush ferns.

words.definition: producing or capable of producing abundant vegetation or offspring; fertile
words.example: The delta's fecund soil yielded three harvests a year.

words.definition: capable of producing abundant crops or vegetation; productive
words.example: The valley's fertile soil supported the whole region.

words.definition: having little or no rain; too dry to support vegetation
words.example: Little grows in the arid stretch beyond the mountains.

words.definition: too poor to produce much or any vegetation; unfruitful
words.example: Only scrub survived on the barren plateau.

words.definition: thoroughly dried out; drained of moisture or vitality
words.example: The desiccated riverbed had not seen water in years.

words.definition: in its original, unspoiled condition; clean and fresh
words.example: The reef remained pristine, untouched by tourism.

words.definition: not damaged or ruined; retaining its natural state
words.example: An unspoiled beach without a single building in sight.

words.definition: relating to the peaceful, simple beauty of the countryside
words.example: The painting captured a pastoral scene of grazing sheep.

words.definition: extremely happy, peaceful, or picturesque; like an idealized rural scene
words.example: They spent an idyllic week at the lake house.

words.definition: relating to pleasant rural life and scenery
words.example: A bucolic village with a single church spire.

story: Crossing the border into the delta, the land changed completely. Behind them lay [[arid|arid]], [[barren|barren]] plains and a [[desiccated|desiccated]] riverbed; ahead spread a [[verdant|verdant]], [[lush|lush]] valley whose [[fecund|fecund]] soil made it the most [[fertile|fertile]] region in the country. The lake at its center was still [[pristine|pristine]] and [[unspoiled|unspoiled]], ringed by [[pastoral|pastoral]] farms that looked almost [[idyllic|idyllic]] in the evening light — a thoroughly [[bucolic|bucolic]] scene after so many dusty miles.
